name: myproject (humble, cpu)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ripgrep fd-find && sudo ln -sf $(command -v fdfind) /usr/local/bin/fd && curl -fsSL https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/download/nightly/nvim-linux-x86_64.tar.gz -o /tmp/nvim.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /opt/nvim-linux-x86_64 && sudo tar -C /opt -xzf /tmp/nvim.tar.gz && sudo ln -sf /opt/nvim-linux-x86_64/bin/nvim /usr/local/bin/nvim && rm -f /tmp/nvim.tar.gz
